domain: wearable sports safety gear, helmet mounts, protective equipment hardware, and adjustment mechanisms

ideas.product_context: Cycling and skating helmets that need removable or adjustable face shields.
ideas.core_function: Allows a visor to pivot between raised and lowered positions while locking securely under vibration.
ideas.likely_main_part: Detented hinge bracket with integrated latch tabs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines rotational clearance, snap-fit retention, asymmetric mounting ears, and repeated small locking features around a curved helmet interface.

ideas.idea_title: Sliding goggle strap anchor for protective helmets
ideas.product_context: Snow, motocross, and field-sport helmets where goggles need stable strap routing.
ideas.core_function: Captures a goggle strap and lets the anchor slide to tune strap angle without detaching hardware.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile rail clip with captive sliding loop.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires nested sliding geometry, undercuts, strap pass-throughs, stop features, and a mount that conforms to a curved shell.

ideas.product_context: Adventure sports helmets that carry accessories but must release during high-force impacts.
ideas.core_function: Holds a camera during normal motion and separates in a controlled direction during snagging or impact.
ideas.likely_main_part: Frangible dovetail base with replaceable shear insert.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests representation of intentional weak points, keyed sliding interfaces, directional release geometry, and replaceable internal inserts.

ideas.product_context: Helmets and headguards that need fine strap fit adjustment while worn.
ideas.core_function: Takes up slack in paired straps through a dial mechanism with tactile indexed positions.
ideas.likely_main_part: Ratchet dial housing with twin strap spool channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes concentric moving parts, pawl-and-tooth detail, strap routing tunnels, finger grip texture, and serviceable enclosure seams.

ideas.idea_title: Ventilated shin guard impact insert carrier
ideas.product_context: Soccer, hockey, and martial-arts shin guards using interchangeable impact pads.
ideas.core_function: Holds a removable protective insert while preserving airflow and keeping the pad aligned against the leg.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved perforated carrier shell with flexible retention lips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with anatomical curvature, patterned ventilation cutouts, soft-edge retention flanges, and thin protective shell transitions.

ideas.product_context: Contact-sport shoulder protection where straps connect shell sections across moving joints.
ideas.core_function: Joins several straps to a protective shell while allowing limited articulation and quick replacement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Multi-axis strap yoke with pivoting buckle sockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests branching load paths, multiple strap slot orientations, pivot bosses, buckle capture geometry, and compact hardware packaging.

ideas.idea_title: Helmet rear fit cradle with flex arms
ideas.product_context: Bike, climbing, and skating helmets that tighten around the back of the head.
ideas.core_function: Supports the rear head fit system and flexes to accommodate head shape while distributing pressure.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved occipital cradle with compliant side arms and adjustment interface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires thin compliant arms, ergonomic curvature, integrated hinge-like flex zones, and attachment points for a separate tension system.

ideas.product_context: Goalkeeper, motorcycle, and combat-sport gloves with hard knuckle protection.
ideas.core_function: Spans across knuckles to absorb impact while allowing finger flexion beneath the guard.
ideas.likely_main_part: Segmented knuckle bridge with living-link relief gaps.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises segmented shell modeling, clearance gaps, organic protective contours, underside standoff ribs, and repeated but non-identical lobes.

ideas.product_context: Hockey, lacrosse, and catcher helmets where a face cage attaches to shell hardware.
ideas.core_function: Clamps around a cage wire and fastens it to a helmet shell when original tabs are replaced or upgraded.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split saddle clamp with shell mounting ear and anti-rotation groove.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split-part clamp geometry, cylindrical wire capture, screw boss placement, anti-rotation features, and mixed curved-flat mating surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Protective vests, pads, and helmets where buckles must be accessible but shielded from accidental release.
ideas.core_function: Covers a quick-release buckle while leaving a raised pull tab accessible to a gloved hand.
ideas.likely_main_part: Buckle shroud with guarded pull-tab channel.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines protective hooding, ergonomic access openings, strap clearance slots, flexible latch geometry, and collision-sensitive internal spaces.
